title: crotalaria rzedowskii
intro: Crotalaria rzedowskii, also known as Rzedowskii leaf, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria rzedowskii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as wounds and ulcers. The herbal preparations of Crotalaria rzedowskii typically involve using the leaves and roots to make teas, infusions, or decoctions.
